_meta.matrix: 26 — Dragon-egg tone wedge (no body / locomotion / sight / speech in second-person narration)
_meta.notes: Form #4 wedge validation. The egg is the most passive of the typed forms — it cannot move, cannot speak, cannot see. Its primary verbs are internal (rock, hum_low, kindle_glow, absorb_warmth). Together with scenarios 04 (slime), 22 (book), 24 (core), this completes the four-form tone wedge across the typed catalogue.

input: I kindle a faint glow to keep the warmth
